requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (SAZ / ZWS adopting IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（SAZ / ZWS 采纳 IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（SAZ / ZWS 採納 IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Zimbabwe market are expected to meet the general luminaire safety requirements of IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), which the Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) typically adopts as a ZWS national standard, often aligned with the SANS (South African) adoption of the same IEC base. Core safety requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation, creepage and clearance distances, thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminals. Product safety should be demonstrated against the IEC 60598-1 base at the relevant nominal voltage of 230 V / 50 Hz. SAZ operates conformity-assessment and import-inspection arrangements for regulated products; whether a specific luminaire is subject to mandatory pre-shipment or import conformity assessment should be confirmed with SAZ and the in-country importer, because Zimbabwe does not operate a single horizontal CE-style self-declaration mark.
summary.zh: 在津巴布韦市场销售的 LED 灯具应满足 IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：通用要求和试验）的通用灯具安全要求；津巴布韦标准协会（SAZ）通常将其采纳为 ZWS 国家标准，并常与南非 SANS 对同一 IEC 基础标准的采纳保持一致。核心安全要求涵盖防触电、绝缘、爬电距离和电气间隙、热耐久性、机械强度及接线端子。产品安全应在 230 V / 50 Hz 标称电压下依据 IEC 60598-1 基础标准予以证明。SAZ 对受监管产品设有合格评定与进口检验安排；具体灯具是否须接受强制性装运前或进口合格评定，应与 SAZ 及在地进口商确认，因为津巴布韦并不实行单一的横向 CE 式自我声明标志。
summary.zht: 在辛巴威市場銷售的 LED 燈具應滿足 IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：通用要求和試驗）的通用燈具安全要求；辛巴威標準協會（SAZ）通常將其採納為 ZWS 國家標準，並常與南非 SANS 對同一 IEC 基礎標準的採納保持一致。核心安全要求涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、爬電距離和電氣間隙、熱耐久性、機械強度及接線端子。產品安全應在 230 V / 50 Hz 標稱電壓下依據 IEC 60598-1 基礎標準予以證明。SAZ 對受監管產品設有合格評定與進口檢驗安排；具體燈具是否須接受強制性裝運前或進口合格評定，應與 SAZ 及在地進口商確認，因為辛巴威並不實行單一的橫向 CE 式自我聲明標誌。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (adopted by SAZ as a ZWS standard; often SANS-aligned)
Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — conformity assessment / import inspection arrangements for regulated electrical products

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026, with the designation changing from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T. CCC obligations for in-scope residential luminaires remain governed by applicable CNCA rules. Both GB/T 7000.1 and the Zimbabwe-adopted IEC 60598-1 derive from the same IEC base, so the technical content is broadly comparable, but the conformity-assessment process and documentation are separate and not mutually recognised by SAZ.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，标准属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T。范围内居民灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定。GB/T 7000.1 与津巴布韦采纳的 IEC 60598-1 同源于 IEC 基础标准，技术内容大致相当，但合格评定程序及文件均独立，且不被 SAZ 互认。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，標準屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T。範圍內居民燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定。GB/T 7000.1 與辛巴威採納的 IEC 60598-1 同源於 IEC 基礎標準，技術內容大致相當，但合格評定程序及文件均獨立，且不被 SAZ 互認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; recommended GB/T designation)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both China GB/T 7000.1 and the Zimbabwe-adopted IEC 60598-1 share the same IEC base, so the technical safety content is largely aligned. The practical gaps are administrative and electrical, not substance-based: (1) Zimbabwe relies on SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection rather than China CCC — CCC certificates and GB test reports are not accepted by SAZ, so testing against the IEC 60598-1 / ZWS edition by an ILAC MRA-recognised lab is advisable; (2) nominal voltage is 230 V (vs China 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase) — although 50 Hz is shared, products must be rated and marked for 230 V; (3) confirm with SAZ and the in-country importer whether the specific luminaire category is subject to mandatory conformity assessment or import inspection. There is no single horizontal CE-style self-declaration mark in Zimbabwe.
gap.zh: 中国 GB/T 7000.1 与津巴布韦采纳的 IEC 60598-1 同以 IEC 为基础，技术安全内容基本对齐。实际差距是行政性与电气性的，而非物质层面：（1）津巴布韦依赖 SAZ 合格评定/进口检验，而非中国 CCC——CCC 证书及 GB 检测报告不被 SAZ 接受，故建议委托 ILAC MRA 认可实验室按 IEC 60598-1 / ZWS 版本检测；（2）标称电压为 230 V（vs 中国 220 V 单相 / 380 V 三相）——尽管同为 50 Hz，产品须按 230 V 定额并标注；（3）须与 SAZ 及在地进口商确认具体灯具类别是否须接受强制合格评定或进口检验。津巴布韦不存在单一的横向 CE 式自我声明标志。
gap.zht: 中國 GB/T 7000.1 與辛巴威採納的 IEC 60598-1 同以 IEC 為基礎，技術安全內容基本對齊。實際差距是行政性與電氣性的，而非物質層面：（1）辛巴威依賴 SAZ 合格評定/進口檢驗，而非中國 CCC——CCC 證書及 GB 檢測報告不被 SAZ 接受，故建議委託 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室按 IEC 60598-1 / ZWS 版本檢測；（2）標稱電壓為 230 V（vs 中國 220 V 單相 / 380 V 三相）——儘管同為 50 Hz，產品須按 230 V 定額並標註；（3）須與 SAZ 及在地進口商確認具體燈具類別是否須接受強制合格評定或進口檢驗。辛巴威不存在單一的橫向 CE 式自我聲明標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — product must meet IEC 60598-1 (ZWS-adopted) safety; whether SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection is mandatory depends on the product category and import route — confirm with SAZ and the in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire remains within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires for Zimbabwe should be built and tested to IEC 60598-1 as adopted in the ZWS standard set, rated for 230 V / 50 Hz. Chinese CCC certification and GB/T 7000.1-2023 evidence are not accepted by SAZ. Whether mandatory SAZ conformity assessment or import inspection applies to a given luminaire category should be confirmed with SAZ and the in-country importer; Zimbabwe has no single horizontal CE-style self-declaration mark.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向津巴布韦的 LED 灯具应按 ZWS 标准体系所采纳的 IEC 60598-1 设计与检测，并按 230 V / 50 Hz 定额。中国 CCC 认证及 GB/T 7000.1-2023 证据不被 SAZ 接受。具体灯具类别是否适用强制 SAZ 合格评定或进口检验，应与 SAZ 及在地进口商确认；津巴布韦不存在单一的横向 CE 式自我声明标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向辛巴威的 LED 燈具應按 ZWS 標準體系所採納的 IEC 60598-1 設計與檢測，並按 230 V / 50 Hz 定額。中國 CCC 認證及 GB/T 7000.1-2023 證據不被 SAZ 接受。具體燈具類別是否適用強制 SAZ 合格評定或進口檢驗，應與 SAZ 及在地進口商確認；辛巴威不存在單一的橫向 CE 式自我聲明標誌。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamps — Safety (SAZ / ZWS adopting IEC 62560)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯——安全（SAZ / ZWS 采纳 IEC 62560）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈——安全（SAZ / ZWS 採納 IEC 62560）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (retrofit LED bulbs with integrated control gear, > 50 V) intended for Zimbabwe should meet the safety requirements of IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications), which SAZ typically adopts as a ZWS standard. IEC 62560 covers marking, interchangeability (cap/holder compatibility), protection against electric shock, insulation resistance, mechanical strength, fault conditions, and thermal endurance. Lamps must be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz with standard caps (commonly E27 / B22 for the Zimbabwe market). Evidence of conformity is typically a test report against the adopted IEC 62560 standard; SAZ import-inspection / conformity-assessment arrangements may apply depending on the product category and import route.
summary.zh: 面向津巴布韦的自镇流 LED 灯（带集成控制装置的替换式 LED 灯泡，电压 > 50 V）应满足 IEC 62560（电压 > 50 V 普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）的安全要求；SAZ 通常将其采纳为 ZWS 标准。IEC 62560 涵盖标志、互换性（灯头/灯座兼容性）、防触电、绝缘电阻、机械强度、故障条件及热耐久性。灯具须按 230 V / 50 Hz 定额，采用标准灯头（津巴布韦市场常见 E27 / B22）。符合性证据通常为依据所采纳的 IEC 62560 标准出具的检测报告；视产品类别及进口路径，可能适用 SAZ 进口检验/合格评定安排。
summary.zht: 面向辛巴威的自鎮流 LED 燈（帶集成控制裝置的替換式 LED 燈泡，電壓 > 50 V）應滿足 IEC 62560（電壓 > 50 V 普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）的安全要求；SAZ 通常將其採納為 ZWS 標準。IEC 62560 涵蓋標誌、互換性（燈頭/燈座兼容性）、防觸電、絕緣電阻、機械強度、故障條件及熱耐久性。燈具須按 230 V / 50 Hz 定額，採用標準燈頭（辛巴威市場常見 E27 / B22）。符合性證據通常為依據所採納的 IEC 62560 標準出具的檢測報告；視產品類別及進口路徑，可能適用 SAZ 進口檢驗/合格評定安排。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications (adopted by SAZ as a ZWS standard)
Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — conformity assessment / import inspection for regulated lamps

summary.en: China's equivalent self-ballasted LED lamp safety standard is GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED-lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications), technically aligned with IEC 62560, supplemented by GB/T 24908 for performance. Self-ballasted LED lamps in defined scope require CCC certification for the Chinese market under the applicable CNCA rules. The IEC base is shared, but CN GB test reports and CCC certificates are not recognised by SAZ.
summary.zh: 中国对应的自镇流 LED 灯安全标准为 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用电压 > 50 V 自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），技术上与 IEC 62560 对齐，性能方面由 GB/T 24908 补充。范围内的自镇流 LED 灯在中国市场须依据适用的 CNCA 规则取得 CCC 认证。IEC 基础标准相同，但中国 GB 检测报告及 CCC 证书不被 SAZ 认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應的自鎮流 LED 燈安全標準為 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用電壓 > 50 V 自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），技術上與 IEC 62560 對齊，性能方面由 GB/T 24908 補充。範圍內的自鎮流 LED 燈在中國市場須依據適用的 CNCA 規則取得 CCC 認證。IEC 基礎標準相同，但中國 GB 檢測報告及 CCC 證書不被 SAZ 認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED-lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 24908 — Performance requirements for self-ballasted LED-lamps for general lighting services

gap.en: GB 24906 and Zimbabwe's adopted IEC 62560 share the same IEC base, so lamp safety content is largely aligned. Practical gaps: (1) lamp caps must match the Zimbabwe installed base (commonly E27 / B22) and be rated for 230 V / 50 Hz, not 220 V; (2) CN CCC certificates and GB 24906 reports are not accepted — a report against the ZWS-adopted IEC 62560 from an ILAC MRA-recognised lab is advisable; (3) confirm with SAZ / the in-country importer whether self-ballasted lamps fall within a mandatory conformity-assessment or import-inspection category. Performance / energy claims should be supported separately (see ledzw-ecodesign).
gap.zh: GB 24906 与津巴布韦采纳的 IEC 62560 同以 IEC 为基础，灯具安全内容基本对齐。实际差距：（1）灯头须匹配津巴布韦的存量市场（常见 E27 / B22）并按 230 V / 50 Hz 而非 220 V 定额；（2）中国 CCC 证书及 GB 24906 报告不被接受——建议提供 ILAC MRA 认可实验室按 ZWS 采纳的 IEC 62560 出具的报告；（3）须与 SAZ / 在地进口商确认自镇流灯是否属于强制合格评定或进口检验类别。性能/能效声称应另行支撑（见 ledzw-ecodesign）。
gap.zht: GB 24906 與辛巴威採納的 IEC 62560 同以 IEC 為基礎，燈具安全內容基本對齊。實際差距：（1）燈頭須匹配辛巴威的存量市場（常見 E27 / B22）並按 230 V / 50 Hz 而非 220 V 定額；（2）中國 CCC 證書及 GB 24906 報告不被接受——建議提供 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室按 ZWS 採納的 IEC 62560 出具的報告；（3）須與 SAZ / 在地進口商確認自鎮流燈是否屬於強制合格評定或進口檢驗類別。性能/能效聲稱應另行支撐（見 ledzw-ecodesign）。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — lamps should meet IEC 62560 (ZWS-adopted) safety and be rated 230 V / 50 Hz; applicability of mandatory SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection depends on product category and import route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC required for in-scope self-ballasted LED lamps under applicable CNCA rules; GB 24906-2010 is the safety standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps for Zimbabwe should be tested to IEC 62560 as adopted in the ZWS set, rated 230 V / 50 Hz with caps matching the local base (E27 / B22). Chinese GB 24906 reports and CCC certificates are not accepted by SAZ. Confirm whether the lamp category triggers mandatory SAZ conformity assessment or import inspection with SAZ and the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向津巴布韦的自镇流 LED 灯应按 ZWS 体系采纳的 IEC 62560 检测，按 230 V / 50 Hz 定额，灯头匹配本地存量（E27 / B22）。中国 GB 24906 报告及 CCC 证书不被 SAZ 接受。请与 SAZ 及在地进口商确认该灯类是否触发强制 SAZ 合格评定或进口检验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向辛巴威的自鎮流 LED 燈應按 ZWS 體系採納的 IEC 62560 檢測，按 230 V / 50 Hz 定額，燈頭匹配本地存量（E27 / B22）。中國 GB 24906 報告及 CCC 證書不被 SAZ 接受。請與 SAZ 及在地進口商確認該燈類是否觸發強制 SAZ 合格評定或進口檢驗。
